plugin.name: scala-maven-plugin
plugin.description: The scala-maven-plugin (previously maven-scala-plugin) is used for compiling/testing/running/documenting scala code of any maven project.

mojo.description: Compile Scala test source into test-classes. Corresponds roughly to testCompile in maven-compiler-plugin

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: addZincArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call zinc server It is a pipe '|' separated list of arguments, so it can be used from command line ("-DaddZincArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|...").

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compileOrder
parameter.description:
Compile order for Scala and Java sources for sbt incremental compile.
Can be Mixed, JavaThenScala, or ScalaThenJava.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: excludes
failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: includes
javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: notifyCompilation
parameter.description: notifyCompilation if true then print a message "path: compiling" for each root directory or files that will be compiled. Useful for debug, and for integration with Editor/IDE to reset markers only for compiled files.

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: recompileMode
parameter.description: Recompile mode to use when sources were previously compiled and there is at least one change: "modified-only" => only modified sources are recompiled (pre 2.13 behavior), "all" => all sources are recompiled, "incremental" => incrementally recompile modified sources and other affected sources.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: sendJavaToScalac
parameter.description: Enables/Disables sending java source to the scala compiler.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: skip
parameter.description: Set this to 'true' to bypass unit tests entirely. Its use is NOT RECOMMENDED, but quite convenient on occasion.

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: testAnalysisCacheFile
parameter.description: Analysis cache file for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: testOutputDir
parameter.description: The directory in which to place test compilation output

parameter.name: testSourceDir
parameter.description: The directory in which to find test scala source code

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

parameter.name: useZincServer
parameter.description: Use zinc server for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: zincPort
parameter.description: Zinc server port, if running with incremental zinc server mode.

mojo.description: Compile the main and test scala source directory then run unit test cases in continuous (infinite loop). This is an util goal for commandline usage only (Do not use or call it in a pom) !!!

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: addZincArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call zinc server It is a pipe '|' separated list of arguments, so it can be used from command line ("-DaddZincArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|...").

parameter.name: analysisCacheFile
parameter.description: Analysis cache file for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: ccTestGoals
checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compileOrder
parameter.description:
Compile order for Scala and Java sources for sbt incremental compile.
Can be Mixed, JavaThenScala, or ScalaThenJava.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: excludes
failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: includes
javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: localRepositoryPath
parameter.description: The local repository for caching artifacts. It is strongly recommended to specify a path to an isolated repository like ${project.build.directory}/it-repo. Otherwise, your ordinary local repository will be used, potentially soiling it with broken artifacts.

parameter.name: mainOutputDir
parameter.description: The output directory for compilation.

parameter.name: mainSourceDir
parameter.description: The main directory containing scala source for compilation

parameter.name: notifyCompilation
parameter.description: notifyCompilation if true then print a message "path: compiling" for each root directory or files that will be compiled. Useful for debug, and for integration with Editor/IDE to reset markers only for compiled files.

parameter.name: once
parameter.description: Define if cc should run once or in infinite loop. (useful for test or working with editor)

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: recompileMode
parameter.description: Recompile mode to use when sources were previously compiled and there is at least one change: "modified-only" => only modified sources are recompiled (pre 2.13 behavior), "all" => all sources are recompiled, "incremental" => incrementally recompile modified sources and other affected sources.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: sendJavaToScalac
parameter.description: Enables/Disables sending java source to the scala compiler.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: test
parameter.description: Specify this parameter to run individual tests by file name, overriding the includes/excludes parameters. Each pattern you specify here will be used to create an include pattern formatted like **/${test}.java, so you can just type "-Dtest=MyTest" to run a single test called "foo/MyTest.java". This parameter will override the TestNG suiteXmlFiles parameter.

parameter.name: testAnalysisCacheFile
parameter.description: Analysis cache file for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: testOutputDir
parameter.description: The directory to place test compilation output in

parameter.name: testSourceDir
parameter.description: The directory containing test source for compilation

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

parameter.name: useFsc
parameter.description: Define if fsc should be used, else scalac is used. fsc => scala.tools.nsc.CompileClient, scalac => scala.tools.nsc.Main.

parameter.name: useZincServer
parameter.description: Use zinc server for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: verbose
parameter.description: Turns verbose output on.

parameter.name: zincPort
parameter.description: Zinc server port, if running with incremental zinc server mode.

mojo.description: Creates a jar of the non-aggregated scaladoc and attaches it to the project for distribution.

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: aggregateDirectOnly
parameter.description: If you want to aggregate only direct sub modules.

parameter.name: archive
parameter.description: The archive configuration to use. See Maven Archiver Reference.

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: attach
parameter.description: Specifies whether to attach the generated artifact to the project helper.

parameter.name: bottom
parameter.description: Specifies the text to be placed at the bottom of each output file. If you want to use html you have to put it in a CDATA section, eg. <![CDATA[Copyright 2005, <a href="http://www.mycompany.com">MyCompany, Inc.<a>]]> [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: charset
parameter.description: Charset for cross-platform viewing of generated documentation. [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: defaultManifestFile
parameter.description: Path to the default MANIFEST file to use. It will be used if useDefaultManifestFile is set to true.

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: description
parameter.description: The description of the Scaladoc report.

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: doctitle
parameter.description: Include title for the overview page. [scaladoc, scaladoc2, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: excludes
failOnError
parameter.description: Specifies if the build will fail if there are errors during javadoc execution or not.

parameter.name: failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: finalName
parameter.description: Specifies the filename that will be used for the generated jar file. Please note that -javadoc or -test-javadoc will be appended to the file name.

parameter.name: footer
parameter.description: Include footer text for each page. [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: forceAggregate
parameter.description: To allow running aggregation only from command line use "-DforceAggregate=true" (avoid using in pom.xml). [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: header
parameter.description: Include header text for each page [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: includes
jarOutputDirectory
parameter.description: Specifies the directory where the generated jar file will be put.

parameter.name: javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: linksource
parameter.description: Generate source in HTML [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The name of the Scaladoc report.

parameter.name: nocomment
parameter.description: Suppress description and tags, generate only declarations [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Specifies the destination directory where scalaDoc saves the generated HTML files.

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: reportOutputDirectory
parameter.description: Specifies the destination directory where javadoc saves the generated HTML files.

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: scaladocClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the main scaladoc to use, if not define, the the scalaClassName is used

parameter.name: sendJavaToScalac
parameter.description: Enables/Disables sending java source to the scala compiler.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: skip
parameter.description: Specifies whether to skip generating scaladoc.

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: sourceDir
parameter.description: The directory which contains scala/java source files

parameter.name: stylesheetfile
parameter.description: File to change style of the generated documentation [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: top
parameter.description: Include top text for each page [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

parameter.name: useDefaultManifestFile
parameter.description: Set this to true to enable the use of the defaultManifestFile.

parameter.name: vscaladocVersion
parameter.description: If you want to use vscaladoc to generate api instead of regular scaladoc, set the version of vscaladoc you want to use.

parameter.name: windowtitle
parameter.description: Specify window title of generated HTML documentation. [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

mojo.description: Compile the main and test scala source directory in continuous (infinite loop). !! This is an util goal for commandline usage only (Do not use or call it in a pom) !!!

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: addZincArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call zinc server It is a pipe '|' separated list of arguments, so it can be used from command line ("-DaddZincArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|...").

parameter.name: analysisCacheFile
parameter.description: Analysis cache file for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compileOrder
parameter.description:
Compile order for Scala and Java sources for sbt incremental compile.
Can be Mixed, JavaThenScala, or ScalaThenJava.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: excludes
failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: includes
javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: mainOutputDir
parameter.description: The output directory for compilation.

parameter.name: mainSourceDir
parameter.description: The main directory containing scala source for compilation

parameter.name: notifyCompilation
parameter.description: notifyCompilation if true then print a message "path: compiling" for each root directory or files that will be compiled. Useful for debug, and for integration with Editor/IDE to reset markers only for compiled files.

parameter.name: once
parameter.description: Define if cc should run once or in infinite loop. (useful for test or working with editor)

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: recompileMode
parameter.description: Recompile mode to use when sources were previously compiled and there is at least one change: "modified-only" => only modified sources are recompiled (pre 2.13 behavior), "all" => all sources are recompiled, "incremental" => incrementally recompile modified sources and other affected sources.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: sendJavaToScalac
parameter.description: Enables/Disables sending java source to the scala compiler.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: testAnalysisCacheFile
parameter.description: Analysis cache file for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: testOutputDir
parameter.description: The directory to place test compilation output in

parameter.name: testSourceDir
parameter.description: The directory containing test source for compilation

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

parameter.name: useFsc
parameter.description: Define if fsc should be used, else scalac is used. fsc => scala.tools.nsc.CompileClient, scalac => scala.tools.nsc.Main.

parameter.name: useZincServer
parameter.description: Use zinc server for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: verbose
parameter.description: Turns verbose output on.

parameter.name: zincPort
parameter.description: Zinc server port, if running with incremental zinc server mode.

mojo.description: Run the Scala console with all the classes of the projects (dependencies and builded)

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: javaRebelPath
parameter.description: Path of the javaRebel jar. If this option is set then the console run with javarebel enabled.

parameter.name: javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: mainConsole
parameter.description: The console to run.

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

parameter.name: useRuntimeClasspath
parameter.description: Add the runtime classpath, to the console's classpath ?

parameter.name: useTestClasspath
parameter.description: Add the test classpath (include classes from test directory), to the console's classpath ?

mojo.description: Run a Scala class using the Scala runtime

parameter.name: addArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: launcher
parameter.description: The class to use when launching a scala program

parameter.name: launchers
parameter.description:
A list of launcher definition (to avoid rewriting long command line or share way to call an application) launchers could be define by : 
  <launchers>
    <launcher>
      <id>myLauncher</id>
      <mainClass>my.project.Main</mainClass>
      <args>
        <arg>arg1</arg>
      </args>
      <jvmArgs>
        <jvmArg>-Xmx64m</jvmArg>
      </jvmArgs>
    </launcher>
    <launcher>
      <id>myLauncher2</id>
      ...
      <><>
    </launcher>
  </launchers>

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: mainClass
parameter.description:
Main class to call, the call use the jvmArgs and args define in the pom.xml, and the addArgs define in the command line if define.
Higher priority to launcher parameter) Using this parameter only from command line (-DmainClass=...), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

mojo.description: Compiles a directory of Scala source. Corresponds roughly to the compile goal of the maven-compiler-plugin

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: addZincArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call zinc server It is a pipe '|' separated list of arguments, so it can be used from command line ("-DaddZincArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|...").

parameter.name: analysisCacheFile
parameter.description: Analysis cache file for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compileOrder
parameter.description:
Compile order for Scala and Java sources for sbt incremental compile.
Can be Mixed, JavaThenScala, or ScalaThenJava.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: excludes
failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: includes
javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: notifyCompilation
parameter.description: notifyCompilation if true then print a message "path: compiling" for each root directory or files that will be compiled. Useful for debug, and for integration with Editor/IDE to reset markers only for compiled files.

parameter.name: outputDir
parameter.description: The directory in which to place compilation output

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: recompileMode
parameter.description: Recompile mode to use when sources were previously compiled and there is at least one change: "modified-only" => only modified sources are recompiled (pre 2.13 behavior), "all" => all sources are recompiled, "incremental" => incrementally recompile modified sources and other affected sources.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: sendJavaToScalac
parameter.description: Enables/Disables sending java source to the scala compiler.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: sourceDir
parameter.description: The directory which contains scala/java source files

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

parameter.name: useZincServer
parameter.description: Use zinc server for incremental recompilation.

parameter.name: zincPort
parameter.description: Zinc server port, if running with incremental zinc server mode.

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: addToClasspath
parameter.description: Comma seperated list of directories or jars to add to the classpath

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: excludeScopes
parameter.description: Comma separated list of scopes to remove from the classpath. Eg: test,compile

parameter.name: failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: includeScopes
parameter.description: Comma separated list of scopes to add to the classpath. The possible scopes are : test,compile, system, runtime, plugin. By default embedded script into pom.xml run with 'plugin' scope and script read from scriptFile run with 'compile, test, runtime'

parameter.name: javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: keepGeneratedScript
parameter.description: If set to true the Scala classfile that is generated will not be deleted after the goal completes. This is to allows easier debugging of the script especially since line numbers will be wrong because lines are added to the compiled script (see script examples)

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: outputDir
parameter.description: The build directory of the project

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: removeFromClasspath
parameter.description: Comma separated list of directories or jars to remove from the classpath. This is useful for resolving conflicts in the classpath. For example, the script uses Ant 1.7 and the compiler dependencies pull in Ant 1.5 optional which conflicts and causes a crash

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: script
parameter.description: The script that will be executed. Either 'scriptFile' or ' script' must be defined.

parameter.name: scriptFile
parameter.description: The file containing script to be executed. Either 'scriptFile' or 'script' must be defined.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

mojo.description: Add more source directories to the POM.

parameter.name: sourceDir
parameter.description: The directory in which scala source is found

parameter.name: testSourceDir
parameter.description: The directory in which testing scala source is found

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: aggregateDirectOnly
parameter.description: If you want to aggregate only direct sub modules.

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: bottom
parameter.description: Specifies the text to be placed at the bottom of each output file. If you want to use html you have to put it in a CDATA section, eg. <![CDATA[Copyright 2005, <a href="http://www.mycompany.com">MyCompany, Inc.<a>]]> [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: charset
parameter.description: Charset for cross-platform viewing of generated documentation. [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: description
parameter.description: The description of the Scaladoc report.

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: doctitle
parameter.description: Include title for the overview page. [scaladoc, scaladoc2, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: excludes
failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: footer
parameter.description: Include footer text for each page. [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: forceAggregate
parameter.description: To allow running aggregation only from command line use "-DforceAggregate=true" (avoid using in pom.xml). [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: header
parameter.description: Include header text for each page [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: includes
javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: linksource
parameter.description: Generate source in HTML [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: name
parameter.description: The name of the Scaladoc report.

parameter.name: nocomment
parameter.description: Suppress description and tags, generate only declarations [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: outputDirectory
parameter.description: Specifies the destination directory where scalaDoc saves the generated HTML files.

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: reportOutputDirectory
parameter.description: Specifies the destination directory where javadoc saves the generated HTML files.

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: scaladocClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the main scaladoc to use, if not define, the the scalaClassName is used

parameter.name: sendJavaToScalac
parameter.description: Enables/Disables sending java source to the scala compiler.

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: sourceDir
parameter.description: The directory which contains scala/java source files

parameter.name: stylesheetfile
parameter.description: File to change style of the generated documentation [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: top
parameter.description: Include top text for each page [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

parameter.name: vscaladocVersion
parameter.description: If you want to use vscaladoc to generate api instead of regular scaladoc, set the version of vscaladoc you want to use.

parameter.name: windowtitle
parameter.description: Specify window title of generated HTML documentation. [scaladoc, vscaladoc]

parameter.name: addJavacArgs
parameter.description: Alternative method for specifying javac arguments (when using incremental compiler). Can be used from command line with -DaddJavacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|... rather than in pom.xml.

parameter.name: addScalacArgs
parameter.description: Additional parameter to use to call the main class Using this parameter only from command line ("-DaddScalacArgs=arg1|arg2|arg3|..."), not from pom.xml.

parameter.name: args
parameter.description: compiler additionnals arguments

parameter.name: checkMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Check if every dependencies use the same version of scala-library.

parameter.name: compilerPlugins
parameter.description: Compiler plugin dependencies to use when compiling. ex:

parameter.name: dependencies
parameter.description:
Additional dependencies/jar to add to classpath to run "scalaClassName" (scope and optional field not supported) ex : 
   <dependencies>
     <dependency>
       <groupId>org.scala-tools</groupId>
       <artifactId>scala-compiler-addon</artifactId>
       <version>1.0-SNAPSHOT</version>
     </dependency>
   </dependencies>

parameter.name: displayCmd
parameter.description: Display the command line called ? (property 'maven.scala.displayCmd' replaced by 'displayCmd')

parameter.name: encoding
parameter.description: The -encoding argument for the Java compiler. (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: failOnMultipleScalaVersions
parameter.description: Determines if a detection of multiple scala versions in the dependencies will cause the build to fail.

parameter.name: forceUseArgFile
parameter.description: Force the use of an external ArgFile to run any forked process.

parameter.name: fork
parameter.description: Forks the execution of scalac into a separate process.

parameter.name: javacArgs
parameter.description: Arguments for javac (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: javacGenerateDebugSymbols
parameter.description: Whether to instruct javac to generate debug symbols (when using incremental compiler)

parameter.name: jvmArgs
parameter.description: Jvm Arguments.

parameter.name: localRepo
parameter.description: Location of the local repository.

parameter.name: localRepository
parameter.description: The artifact repository to use.

parameter.name: reactorProjects
parameter.description: Contains the full list of projects in the reactor.

parameter.name: remoteRepos
parameter.description: List of Remote Repositories used by the resolver

parameter.name: scalaClassName
parameter.description: className (FQN) of the scala tool to provide as

parameter.name: scalaHome
parameter.description: Path to Scala installation to use instead of the artifact (define as dependencies).

parameter.name: scalaVersion
parameter.description: Scala 's version to use. (property 'maven.scala.version' replaced by 'scala.version')

parameter.name: session
parameter.description: The Maven Session Object

parameter.name: source
parameter.description: The -source argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: target
parameter.description: The -target argument for the Java compiler (when using incremental compiler).

parameter.name: useCanonicalPath
parameter.description: Should use CanonicalPath to normalize path (true => getCanonicalPath, false => getAbsolutePath)

parameter.name: versionOnly
parameter.description: Determines if help will only display a version
